effect.name: DJ EQ
effect.description:
DJ EQ (LADSPA 1901)
The design for this plugin is taken from the Allen & Heath Xone 32 DJ mixer.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Lo Gain
parameter.comment: Controls the gain of the low (100Hz) peak/dip band

parameter.name: Mid Gain
parameter.comment: Controls the gain of the mid (1,000Hz) peak/dip band

parameter.name: Hi Gain
parameter.comment: Controls the gain of the high (10,000Hz) shelf band
